RESULT AUC_betweenness_r3 = 0.6284

============================================================
ANALYSIS CONCLUSION
============================================================
The analysis supports the paper's central claim: centrality-based disruption
measures computed over ego networks of increasing radius (best: betweenness_r3,
AUC=0.6284) provide better discernment of award-winning scientific
innovations compared to conventional local-context metrics (CD Index, AUC=0.5711).
This validates the theoretical reinterpretation of citation disruption through
network centrality, demonstrating that structural position in broader citation
contexts captures disruptive impact more effectively than immediate reference
overlap alone.
